title: Personal details of another claimant
emailHint: The tribunal will use this to send updates about the case

additionalClaimantDob.dayRequired: Enter a day for your date of birth. For example, 23
additionalClaimantDob.monthRequired: Enter a month for your date of birth. For example, 04
additionalClaimantDob.yearRequired: Enter a year for your date of birth. For example, 1981
additionalClaimantDob.dayNotANumber: Day must only contain numbers. For example, 23
additionalClaimantDob.monthNotANumber: Month must only contain numbers. For example, 04
additionalClaimantDob.yearNotANumber: Year must only contain numbers. For example, 1981
additionalClaimantDob.dayInvalid: Date of birth must be a real date.
additionalClaimantDob.monthInvalid: Date of birth must be a real date.
additionalClaimantDob.yearInvalid: Date of birth must be a real date.
additionalClaimantDob.invalidDate: Date of birth must be a real date.
additionalClaimantDob.invalidDateInFuture: Date entered must be in the past.
additionalClaimantDob.invalidDateTooFarInPast: Date must be between 16 years and 100 years in the past.
additionalClaimantDob.invalidDateLessThanSixteenYearsInPast: Date of birth invalid. Claimant must be a minimum of 16 years old
